panels.description: A middle-aged Caucasian man with slicked-back dark hair showing gray at the temples, wearing tortoiseshell glasses, sits alone in a dimly lit dormitory common room with sparse decorations, looking down with a tense posture, trembling visibly.

Close-up of the man's face showing tears streaming down his cheeks, his lips quivering, as he silently sobs, head bowed slightly, illuminated softly from the side, emphasizing his emotional vulnerability.

The man lifts his head slowly, staring intensely forward with a mix of pain and determination in his eyes, still trembling, framed tightly to capture his raw emotion against the blurred dorm room background.

caption_summary: A middle-aged man trembles and silently sobs in a dormitory common room before lifting his head to stare intensely forward.
